name: prism
description: Prism's Claude Code skills: data skills (classify, extract entities, reconcile, schema-bridge, wikilinks) plus a prism-setup family that walks you through setting up a complete Prism — Parachute vault + token, server, tag schemas, desktop config, and integrations (Matrix, Google, Notion, Anthropic, transcripts) — backed by the Parachute vault MCP server.
